page_content:
CPSA201 College Park Scholars: Arts Second-Year Colloquium II (1-2 Credits)

Advanced colloquium II: Arts workshop and Arts Festival. Prerequisite: CPSA200.

Restriction: Students must be matriculated into the College Park Scholars Arts (CPSA) program.

CPSA240 College Park Scholars: Arts Service-Learning Practicum (2 Credits)

Supervised Service-Learning project in an area related to the arts. Prerequisite: CPSA200.

Restriction: Students must be matriculated into the College Park Scholars Arts (CPSA) program.

Additional Information: When paired with successful completion of CPSA 200, students will earn General Education Scholarship-in-Practice credit.

CPSA250 College Park Scholars: Arts Research Practicum (2 Credits) Supervised research project in an area related to the arts.
